title: Tromsoe Heavy Rain
lead: Tromsoe is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.57. This anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The city is currently under a critical weather alert with heavy rain causing disruptions. 
 The relative humidity is at 87% and winds are moderate at 7.6 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 13.5 GG and CDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating demands.
conclusion: Implement immediate emergency response protocols to ensure public safety.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to flooding
